subject: Introduce new ProvMnSExtension Interface
commit_message:
Introduce new ProvMnSExtension Interface

- New YAML file
- Manually implemented controller
- Basic testware added to test Not Implemented endpoint

Issue-ID: CPS-3175
Change-Id: I486eb9392deaaa876a0bcfb15ddde64041ed1d82
Signed-off-by: seanbeirne <sean.beirne@est.tech>
